items.title: #Cavs are making a starting lineup change tonight in Game 4. Max Strus is sliding into the starting five in place of Dean Wade. James Harden, Donovan Mitchell, Evan Mobley and Jarrett Allen round out the first five.
items.author: Danny Cunningham
items.body_excerpt: #Cavs are making a starting lineup change tonight in Game 4. Max Strus is sliding into the starting five in place of Dean Wade. James Harden, Donovan Mitchell, Evan Mobley and Jarrett Allen round out the first five.

items.title: If you take all of the Knicks points minus Karl-Anthony Towns and all of Cleveland's points minus Dean Wade, both teams scored 108 points in Game 3. Those were the two starters for each team who attempted the fewest shots.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
If you take all of the Knicks points minus Karl-Anthony Towns and all of Cleveland's points minus Dean Wade, both teams scored 108 points in Game 3. Those were the two starters for each team who attempted the fewest shots.

Towns outscored Wade 13-0.
